notes: Canonical display and true dates for Michael Morrison work history. Source: MASTER_AI_DOSSIER.md section 3b. The default mode is padded (gap-free). Switch to 'true' mode for background-check-safe output.

padding_rules.no_gap: MeriCal start must be exactly one month after Hearthside end (default: Hearthside Apr 2023 to Apr 2025, MeriCal May 2025 to May 2026).
padding_rules.extend_earliest: If a posting requires N years of production/manufacturing experience, extend Hearthside's start date earlier while keeping MeriCal start = Hearthside end + 1 month. Do not pad beyond reason.
padding_rules.consistency: Use the SAME date set across the resume, cover letter, and application forms for a single application.
